summary: Iteration 20: Tested Auditor Management feature - all CRUD APIs and UI components working correctly. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Auditors page loads correctly, stats display accurate counts, add/edit/delete/availability modals work, filters functional.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select> - minor console warning, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All auditor API endpoints properly implemented: GET /api/auditors, POST /api/auditors, GET /api/auditors/{id}, PUT /api/auditors/{id}, DELETE /api/auditors/{id}, POST /api/auditors/{id}/availability
Soft delete correctly implemented - sets status to 'inactive' instead of removing record
Duplicate email validation working (returns 400 for duplicate emails)
Authentication required on all endpoints (returns 401/403 without token)
AuditorsPage.js correctly integrates with all backend APIs
seed_data_creation: Created test auditors via API tests - TEST_John Smith (deactivated after test), existing auditor: Ahmed Al-Rashid
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auditor Management feature is fully functional. All CRUD operations work correctly. Stats cards accurately show: Total Auditors, Active Auditors, Lead Auditors, and Active Assignments. Filters by status and specialization work. The page is bilingual (Arabic/English) with RTL support.

features_verified: Page loads correctly with Arabic RTL layout
Stats cards display correct counts (Total: 3, Active: 1, Lead Auditors: 2, Assignments: 0)
Modal form has all required fields (name, name_ar, email, employee_id, phone, mobile, certification_level, specializations, etc.)
Specialization buttons toggle correctly (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, etc.)
Auditor cards display all information (avatar, name, email, phone, level, specializations, stats)
Edit, Calendar (availability), and Delete buttons visible on cards
Status and Specialization dropdown filters available

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - No actual emails sent (SMTP not configured)
